title: No Crop Jumping
description: a plugin that disables crop jumping! 🌾
body:
🌾 NCJ (No Crop Jumping) allows you to disable crop jumping on your Minecraft server. Finally, your crops will be saved from that one person always jumping on them.

## 🤖 Commands & Permissions `/ncj` - Toggle crop jumping.
`ncj.bypass` - Bypass crop jumping.
`ncj.toggle` - Access to /ncj.

## 🤝 Contributing & Source [https://github.com/uhAlexz/NoCropJumping](https://github.com/uhAlexz/NoCropJumping)
